stem: The table summarizes the distribution of color and shape for 100 tiles of equal area. If one of these tiles is selected at random, what is the probability of selecting a red tile? (Express your answer as a decimal or fraction, not as a percent.)
explanation: There are 30 red tiles out of 100 total, so the probability of selecting a red tile is 30/100 = 3/10 (equivalently 0.3).
